    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static RfidManager getInstance(android.content.Context context)

      • connect

        public boolean connect(java.lang.Object arg)
        Connect RFID device.
        Parameters:
        arg - When connecting device via Bluetooth, need to pass in the MAC address.

      • disconnect

        public boolean disconnect()
        Disconnect RFID device.

      • setAutoReconnect

        public void setAutoReconnect(boolean auto)
        Set whether to automatically try to reconnect if the device is accidentally disconnected
        Parameters:
        auto - whether to automatically reconnect.

      • addEventListener

        public void addEventListener(EventListener listener)
        Register a event listener.
        Parameters:
        listener - Event listener.

      • removeEventListener

        public void removeEventListener(EventListener listener)
        Unregister a event listener.
        Parameters:
        listener - Event listener.

      • getConnectionState

        public ConnectionState getConnectionState()
        Get device connection state.
        Returns:
        Device connection state.

      • isConnected

        public boolean isConnected()
        Check if the device is connected.

      • createReader

        public void createReader()
        Create a RfidReader object, this object encapsulates all tag-related operations. Such as inventory, read, write, lock, etc.

      • readerAvailable

        public boolean readerAvailable()
        Check if the RfidReader object is available.

        The RfidReader object should immediately enter a normal working state after being successfully created by the application. However, we need to consider that the Bluetooth wireless connection may be sometimes accidentally disconnected (although it is not easy to encounter that). After disconnected, SDK will try to reconnect and restore the state of the RfidReader. During this short period of time, the reader is unavailable until the status is restored.
        Returns:
        If the RfidReader object is available.

      • setTriggerMode

        public void setTriggerMode(TriggerMode mode)
        Set device trigger mode.

      • getTriggerMode

        public TriggerMode getTriggerMode()
        Get device trigger mode.
        Returns:
        Trigger mode.

      • setBeeper

        public boolean setBeeper(boolean on,
                         int freq,
                         int vol)
        Set behavior of the beeper in device.
        Parameters:
        on - Whether the beeper is turned on.
        freq - Beeper frequency, value: 0 - 10.
        vol - Beeper sound level, value: 0 - 10.

      • getBatteryLevel

        public java.lang.String getBatteryLevel()
        Get the battery level.

        public float getBatteryTemperature()
        Get the battery temperature.

        Get the battery charge cycle.

        public boolean setLEDBlink(boolean blink)
        Set whether the LED indicator on the device is blinking.
        Parameters:
        blink - whether the LED is blinking.

      • otaFileChecksum

        public boolean otaFileChecksum(java.lang.String path)
        RFID firmware file integrity check.
        Parameters:
        path - Firmware file path
        Returns:
        Whether the file is valid.

      • firmwareUpdate

                              RfidFirmwareUpdateListener listener)

        listener - Firmware update listener
